reviews.review_description: I was born and grew up with the sight and sound of the pacifc.  Now I am an exile far from the sea.  This helps.   Very adroitly repeating.  Hard to even notice the seguay.
I will change my review once I can actually is this background. I have tried over and over with no success

developer_response.body: My email should be in the description of the app. Feel free to email me with your VR specs and a short description what is happening and I will take a look to see what I can do.

reviews.review_description: I thought this would be good according to the reviews but was disappointed with the quality of the graphics. Each background effect you’re suspended in the air. Not at all realistic!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! I’m actively working on improving the video quality to 8K. Unfortunately, running at that resolution currently causes major latency issues, which I’m still trying to resolve. If anyone has a technical solution, please email me — I’d be incredibly grateful! 🙏

To all other potential users. Just a heads-up: this app uses real-world 360° video, not computer-generated graphics. You can look around, but moving within the scene isn’t possible — the tech just isn’t there yet for this 😕.

Also, If you’re unsure what 5.4K looks like in VR, I highly recommend using the Try Before You Buy feature to help set expectations.

reviews.review_description: Simple beach app/video, cheaply priced and really well done !
